product.title: Color Changing Foundation, 2 Pack, Liquid, Moisturizing, Sunscreen, 30ml
featureBullets: 2 Pack Color Changing Foundation: It is designed for daily use and will give your skin that illuminating silky finish other foundations just don’t provide.it quickly absorbs onto the skin without any dryness or caking.

Color Changing Technology: The exclusive technology contains shade-sensing beads which are encapsulated pigments that deliver perfect shade transformation upon blending into skin and moisturises the skin as it works to even out your complexion.

SPF 15 Sun Protection: This foundation contain SPF 15 sun protection to shield your skin from harmful UVA and UVB rays.Our unique color-matching formula protects and moisturises the skin as it works to even out your complexion.
Pure Natural Makeup: Use as a full face foundation with buildable coverage for a flawless, natural-looking, "I woke up like this" finish.refines pores for a natural looking finish.

After-Sales Service: Flawless colour changing foundation is a revolutionary new liquid foundation that goes on white and instantly self-adjusts to match your EXACT skin tone.If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us and we will give you a satisfactory answer as soon as possible.

specification.value: #13,440 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #147 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation to be better than expensive name brands and appreciate its lightweight feel. The color match receives mixed feedback - while some say it changes to their natural skin tone, others report it doesn't change color at all. Moreover, the coverage, effectiveness, texture, longevity, and natural appearance also get mixed reviews, with some praising the coverage while others say it doesn't cover well, and some finding the texture smooth while others describe it as greasy.

reviews.reviewText: Love this!! Have rosacea on my nose and I dab this on and the redness disappears. Smooth texture. No scent which is nice. Coverage is even and very good. I have very fair skin and the lighter color is perfect for me.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Yes yes a million times yes!
reviews.reviewText: The first foundation I have found to take care of blotchy hormonal face after having twins! I LOVE IT. And can't beat the price!!! It goes on like lotion/sunscreen and is super soft and smells so good. I feel like I put on a moisturizer! Lasts a good bit too! Can't even tell that I have makeup on! Looks super natural and is super lightweight and moisturizing!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: I've got some pros and cons, it’s okay. Not earth shattering by any means.
reviews.reviewText: Meh. Did not change color, however, color was indeed on my fingers blending in. I decided to use a liquid makeup brush instead. Blended very easily, left a sheen on my face. However, I thought it was 50 spf. It’s only 15. So perhaps my sunscreen is causing it not to change colors. But it evened out the redness I have and my under eye shadows. I put a little bit of pressed powder on afterwards. To be honest, it’s for going out to food shop and hike mountains. I could care less what I look like, but this may fit the bill as barely there coverage. I don’t wear liquid makeup, so I liked that it was very light on my skin and dewy. I’m not returning and will keep at it. But beware it’s not a sunscreen that is going to protect you. Was it like the video? Absolutely not. Mostly stayed white-ish but blended nice and easy. I didn’t put on a huge amount as it recommends. That’s on me perhaps. I used such a small amount on the brush. I don’t like clogging my pores. BTW, it noticeably reduced cheek redness, purple undertones under my eyes, and large pores.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 25, 2025

reviews.reviewText: It did not color change exactly to the color shade of my skin but I use this as an undercoat and touch up with LG pressed powder and it looks and feels great! I also love the smell of this. I also love how it feels on my face. I will buy it again.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 25, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I bought this YEUGSCKA Color Changing Foundation on the advice from my friend. Pros: 1. It's very easy to apply, and a little goes a long way. 2. I just apply a little, and it goes on white, but it does change color to your natural skin tone. 3. My skin feels very soft after I apply it with my finger tips or a beauty sponge, and both work well. 4. It's of high quality, and it's very inexpensive for what you get. Cons: There are no cons!! Overall, this is a great product, and you don't have to worry about getting the right shade like with other foundations. Hope this helps!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 8, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Hands down, the best color changing foundation. It's thick like foundation but not like moisturizer. There's no smell and the product helps my makeup last 12 plus hours.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Tired of drugstore make up mistakes? Try this foundation-it will match your skin tone!
reviews.reviewText: My daughter told me about color changing foundation, and this item is a GREAT value for the money. It's lightweight, has good coverage and wasn't sticky. I don't wear make-up very often and always have trouble finding one in the drug store that matches my skin tone. This foundation is a wonderful item. We have a few events coming up for the holidays and I'm looking forward to wearing this foundation. The nice thing is, it doesn't look like you're overly made up. You could wear this just to even out your skin tone and skip the blush! It also has sunscreen and it's moisturizing too!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 11, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I like it makeup -wise but I have only used it a few times since August and it’s gone, since they only fill the tube halfway but the tube is painted white to look like it’s full! Wish they’d fill it up !!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 13, 2025
